settings.title: Product R&D
settings.body: Every run funds prototyping, materials, and real-world field testing for the next Ocean Forged product.

settings.title: You're the crew
settings.body: Wearers help shape what we build next and get early access to new drops. Buying in makes you part of the community.

settings.title: Print on demand
settings.body: Printed and shipped on demand through Printful. No overproduction, no waste — made only when you order.

settings.heading:
Wear the standard.
Fund the next one.
settings.body: Early apparel runs help support the development and testing of Ocean Forged's first technical product. These aren't about profit — buy a tee and you're funding what we build next, and joining the crew that shapes it.
settings.chips: Funds R&D + testing, Community-made, Printed on demand
settings.grid_note: Every piece is printed on demand through Printful and shipped to your door. Sizes and colorways vary by design.
